name: Custom font
description: Applies a custom font selected while patching, replacing Reddit Sans / Roboto. A variable font is recommended so heading and body text keep their different weights. Do not enable "Force system font" at the same time.

options.title: Custom font
options.description: The file path to your font file. Tap the file picker and select it. The font file must be in TTF or OTF format. A variable font is recommended so heading and body text keep their different weights.

name: Force system font
description: Renders the app using the device's system font instead of Reddit Sans / Roboto.
